name: io.zvid/mcp
title: Zvid
description: Quality-first Zvid authoring with planning, designed examples, validation, approval-aware renders, and opt-in automation profiles.

environmentVariables.name: ZVID_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Zvid API key (format zvid_…). Create one at https://app.zvid.io.

environmentVariables.name: ZVID_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Zvid orchestrator base URL. Defaults to https://api.zvid.io.

environmentVariables.name: ZVID_MCP_PROFILE
environmentVariables.description: Tool profile: readonly, creator (default), automation, or developer.

environmentVariables.name: ZVID_MCP_MAX_RENDER_CREDITS
environmentVariables.description: Maximum credits one render_media call may spend. Defaults to 30.

environmentVariables.name: ZVID_MCP_MAX_BULK_ITEMS
environmentVariables.description: Maximum items accepted by create_bulk_render in automation/developer profiles. Defaults to 25.
